title: invitations — entitlements
description: Two entitlement KEYS this module reads at send time. Values are seeded per Tenant by the entitlements module (from Subscription plan + BusinessType.default_config.entitlements) and cached per tenant. Enforcement lives in the `throttle.invitations` middleware — a 402 is returned when the tenant is at cap, distinct from the 429 rate-limit response.

kinds.description: Consumable pool decremented on each send. Resets on period roll.
No cap. `remaining` is null on the wire.

entitlements.description: Max invitations a tenant can send in a calendar month. Consumed on transition into `sent`. Rejected sends do NOT consume the pool. Default: 1000 for Growth plan tenants; unlimited for Enterprise.
Per-channel enablement. E.g. `invitations.channels.sms=true` on a plan that includes SMS delivery. Fallback: only `email` and `link` channels available if the tenant does not have the boolean grant.
